style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Charizard's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in polished steel plates. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into metallic dust particles drifting upward. The aura is a cool, intense cerulean halo with geometric precision, illuminating the scene in crisp, icy light. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
